arts.ttl: How West Brom boss Carlos Corberan responded when asked about Wolves manager links
arts.sum: "I came here just to be focused on giving you answers to questions on the game we are going to play against Sheffield United," he said, ahead of the welcoming of the Blades to The Hawthorns for a televised fixture on Sunday. Carlos Corberan refused to be drawn on speculation linking him with a move from West Bromwich Albion to arch rivals Wolverhampton Wanderers, after a report emerged in his native Spain on Friday suggesting he had jumped to the top of their wanted list.
